articles.headline: Socceroos vs. Egypt live: Australia chasing after Ashour's early goal
articles.description: It's all on the line as the Socceroos take on Egypt in Dallas in the round of 32 at the 2026 FIFA World Cup. Follow the action with ESPN live from Dallas, Texas.

images.name: Ashour puts Egypt ahead in Dallas
images.caption: Emam Ashour scores a neatly tucked header to put Egypt ahead of the Socceroos in this Round of 32 clash.

articles.headline: World Cup Daily live: Travel chaos sees Speed miss Ronaldo game; Australia face Egypt
articles.description: It's the final day of the round of 32 at the 2026 FIFA World Cup as we decide the final three spots for the round of 16.

articles.headline: Brazil's Carlo Ancelotti: Sir Alex Ferguson is only manager more qualified
articles.description: Brazil manager Carlo Ancelotti had a reply to social media doubters in Brazil on Friday, saying legendary former Manchester United manager Sir Alex Ferguson is the only manager more qualified than he is.

images.name: Carlo Ancelotti [1296x729]
images.alt: Carlo Ancelotti, Head Coach of Brazil, speaks to the media during press conference of Brazil one day ahead of the FIFA World Cup 2026 Round Of 32 match between Group C Winner and Group F Runner-Up at Houston Stadium on June 28, 2026 in Houston, Texas.
images.credit: Michael Regan - FIFA/FIFA via Getty Images
